signals.headline: CLARITY Act Senate Banking Committee Markup | PENDING | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
CLARITY Act Senate Banking Committee Markup | PENDING | HIGH confidence**

The markup was targeted for late April (before April 20) with bipartisan agreement reportedly reached on stablecoin provisions[1][2]. As of the search results' publication date (April 16), this had not yet occurred, so confirmation of its scheduling or passage would be significant market-moving news.

signals.headline: Recent Powell Remarks on Tariffs (Mar 19, 2026)** | NO | MED confidence
signals.raw:
Recent Powell Remarks on Tariffs (Mar 19, 2026)** | NO | MED confidence  
Powell expressed uncertainty on tariff impacts, noting they act as one-time price increases but pass-through timing is unpredictable; staff now model declining tariff inflation mid-year, assuming administration restores overturned tariffs[1].
matched_markets: Will Powell say "Tariff inflation" during April press conference?

signals.headline: Upcoming FOMC Meeting (Apr 28-29)** | NO | HIGH confidence
signals.raw:
Upcoming FOMC Meeting (Apr 28-29)** | NO | HIGH confidence  
99% market odds for no rate change (holding 3.5-3.75%); Fed in wait-and-see mode amid Iran war-driven energy/inflation pressures[2].

signals.headline: Powell Succession Uncertainty** | NO | HIGH confidence
signals.raw:
Powell Succession Uncertainty** | NO | HIGH confidence  
Powell term ends May 2026; Trump nominee Kevin Warsh awaits Senate confirmation amid delays (e.g., Sen. Tillis block); Powell may stay temporarily[2][3].

signals.headline: Warsh Criticism (Apr 4)** | NO | MED confidence
signals.raw:
Warsh Criticism (Apr 4)** | NO | MED confidence  
Warsh called Fed's 2021-2022 inflation handling a "fatal policy error" in confirmation hearing[3].

signals.headline: Powell on 2026 Inflation** | NO | LOW confidence
signals.raw:
Powell on 2026 Inflation** | NO | LOW confidence  
Powell linked higher 2026 inflation projection partly to oil shocks (date unspecified in clip)[4].
